title: Greens call on Swinney to ban US Military from Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Greens call on Swinney to ban US Military from Prestwick Airport. The Scottish Greens have called on John Swinney to ban the US military from using Prestwick Airport to launch its attacks against Iran.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Greens call on Swinney to ban US Military from Prestwick Airport
